name: Yamtrack
compose:
name: slashnode-yamtrack
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/fuzzygrim/yamtrack:0.25.3
    container_name: yamtrack-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - redis
    environment:
      SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      REDIS_URL: redis://yamtrack-redis:6379
    volumes:
      - web_data-db:/yamtrack/db:rw
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8742:8000
  redis:
    image: redis:8.0.2
    container_name: yamtrack-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data:rw
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-db:
    name: slashnode-yamtrack_web_data-db
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-yamtrack_redis_data-redis
